description: Lincoln's refuge is shattered as his friend John reveals he has called the authorities after seeing news reports about Lincoln. The confrontation escalates, ending in tragedy when John suffers a heart attack and Lincoln desperately tries, and fails, to save him. Lincoln is left grief-stricken and wracked with guilt.

transcript.line: Not exactly the penthouse view. You looking for something?
No, I just... it's hard to relax, you know?
Maybe I will hop in the shower. John, what's up? What's wrong?
You just stay where you are. Don't touch me.
I called the hotline. They said that you're dangerous. Lincoln, they said that you killed people.
I never killed anyone, I swear. You said you know what type of man I am.
I don't even know what you are. They say you're an alien.
It's not at all what you think.
You just stay there. Stay there! I'm not kidding! Stay there. They're gonna be here any minute.
Here. I'm gonna leave the money and take the car. You don't need to be involved.
Get out of my way! Sorry I brought you into this.
No, no, no, no. No, John. Come on, John!
